title: culcitium nivale
intro: Culcitium nivale, also known as snow hair grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Culcitium nivale include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
